name: Bulbasaur
description: A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. The plant sprouts and grows with this Pokémon.

name: Chikorita
description: It uses the leaf on its head to determine the temperature and humidity. It loves to sunbathe.

name: Treecko
description: Small hooks on the bottom of its feet catch on walls and ceilings. That is how it can hang from above.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

name: Turtwig
description: It undertakes photosynthesis with its body, making oxygen. The leaf on its head wilts if it is thirsty.

name: Snivy
description: It is very intelligent and calm. Being exposed to lots of sunlight makes its movements swifter.

attacks.name: Slam
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

name: Chespin
description: The quills on its head are usually soft. When it flexes them, the points become so hard and sharp that they can pierce rock.

name: Rowlet
description: This wary Pokémon uses photosynthesis to store up energy during the day, while becoming active at night.

name: Grookey
description: When it uses its special stick to strike up a beat, the sound waves produced carry revitalizing energy to the plants and flowers in the area.

name: Charmander
description: The flame on its tail indicates Charmander’s life force. If it is healthy, the flame burns brightly.

name: Cyndaquil
description: It has a timid nature. If it is startled, the flames on its back burn more vigorously.

name: Torchic
description: A fire burns inside, so it feels very warm to hug. It launches fireballs of 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit.

attacks.name: Ember
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, discard a Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Chimchar
description: The gas made in its belly burns from its rear end. The fire burns weakly when it feels sick.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.

name: Tepig
description: It blows fire through its nose. When it catches a cold, the fire becomes pitch-black smoke instead.

attacks.name: Ember
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Fennekin
description: Eating a twig fills it with energy, and its roomy ears give vent to air hotter than 390 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Litten
description: While grooming itself, it builds up fur inside its stomach. It sets the fur alight and spews fiery attacks, which change based on how it coughs.

name: Scorbunny
description: A warm-up of running around gets fire energy coursing through this Pokémon’s body. Once that happens, it’s ready to fight at full power.

attacks.name: Super Singe
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Burned.

name: Squirtle
description: It shelters itself in its shell, then strikes back with spouts of water at every opportunity.

attacks.name: Bubble
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Totodile
description: It is small but rough and tough. It won’t hesitate to take a bite out of anything that moves.

attacks.name: Fury Strikes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

name: Mudkip
description: To alert it, the fin on its head senses the flow of water. It has the strength to heft boulders.

name: Piplup
description: Because it is very proud, it hates accepting food from people. Its thick down guards it from cold.

name: Oshawott
description: It fights using the scalchop on its stomach. In response to an attack, it retaliates immediately by slashing.

attacks.name: Water Pulse
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

name: Froakie
description: It secretes flexible bubbles from its chest and back. The bubbles reduce the damage it would otherwise take when attacked.

name: Popplio
description: This Pokémon snorts body fluids from its nose, blowing balloons to smash into its foes. It’s famous for being a hard worker.

name: Sobble
description: When scared, this Pokémon cries. Its tears pack the chemical punch of 100 onions, and attackers won’t be able to resist weeping.

attacks.name: Bind
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Pikachu
description: Its nature is to store up electricity. Forests where nests of Pikachu live are dangerous, since the trees are so often struck by lightning.

attacks.name: Meal Time
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. For each heads, draw a card.
